publication.seoDescription: Preview public Bluesky hashtag posts as JSON. Set onlyNew=true on a saved Task for monitoring. Independent; not affiliated with Bluesky.

discoveryValidation.reason: A broad, active hashtag with a ten-record billing and output cap.

monitoringChange.note: Copy the Task, set onlyNew to true, and schedule that same Task. Later quiet runs can return zero items.
